detail.description:
〓Celebrating Top Ranking in the Store! Download within 72 hours and receive exclusive bonuses worth ¥4200: 200 Gold Coins, 100 Flower Coins, a Random Material Pack, 100 Acceleration Tickets, and 10000 Copper Coins! Limited time offer, first-come, first-served! Join now!〓


'Sakitei ~A Solo Flower Merchant~' is a relaxing social game featuring gardening simulation and management. Grow and harvest hundreds of types of flowers in the game, freely combine them to create beautiful floral arrangements

わくわくする新規アップデート！
パフォーマンス向上と不具合修正により、よりスムーズな体験をお届けします。
